tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a folder in Google Drive.

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a Drive file (including Google Docs/Sheets/Slides) optionally inside a parent folder.

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move a file to a different parent folder (add/remove parents).

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get a Drive file’s metadata by fileId.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Permanently delete a Drive file or folder by fileId.
